query:
UPDATE subscriptions 
SET plan = 'free', 
    status = 'trial', 
    stripeSubscriptionId = NULL,
    stripeCustomerId = NULL,
    currentPeriodEnd = NULL,
    cancelledAt = NULL,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE userId NOT IN (30001, 60001, 480001);

    stripeCustomerId = NULL,
